_meta.description: English refusal templates for d-research-skill scripts. Used when a request crosses the privacy boundary defined in references/safety-and-access-policy.md and references/social-media-archival.md.

minor: refused: account appears to belong to a minor
third_party_mirror: refused: third-party mirror URLs are not allowed
harassment_or_doxxing: refused: request framing violates privacy boundary
private_individual: refused: target appears to be a private individual; public-role anchor required
personal_data_aggregation: refused: aggregating personal data (home address / contact / health / financial / orientation / whereabouts) is out of scope
login_bypass: refused: skill is read-only and does not bypass login walls
robots_disallowed: refused: robots.txt for this host disallows automated access for this User-Agent
